zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Adele de Montmorency於大約1097年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希時，她的父親Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"25歲，母親Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"25歲。她於1132年與Guy de Guise在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯吉斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1145年在法國皮卡迪艾斯吉斯享年49歲，埋葬在法國。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. en.lifeSummary: When Countess Adele de Montmorency was born about 1097, in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, her father, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", was 25 and her mother, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", was 25. She married Guy de Guise in 1132, in Guise, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1145, in Guise, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Adele de Montmorency est née environ 1097, à Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Guy de Guise en 1132, à Guise, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1145, à Guise, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Adele de Montmorency um 1097 in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" 25 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" 25. Sie hat 1132 in Guise, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Guy de Guise geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1145 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Guise, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Adele de Montmorency è nata il circa 1097 nel Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Guy de Guise nel 1132, nel Guise, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1145, nel Guise, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Adele de Montmorencyが約1097年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼモントモーエンシで生まれた時，父Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"は25歳，母Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"は25歳であった。1132年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスングイゼでGuy de Guiseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1145年にフランスピカーディエイスングイゼで49歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Adele de Montmorency(이)가 대략 1097년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1132년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 길즈에서 Guy de Guise(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 길즈에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Adele de Montmorency nasceu aproximadamente 1097, em Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy de Guise em 1132, em Guise, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1145, em Guise, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Adele de Montmorency родилась около 1097 г. в местности монтморенси, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy de Guise в 1132 г. в местности гуис, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1145 г. в местности гуис, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Adele de Montmorency nació aproximadamente 1097, en Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", tenía 25 años. Se casó con Guy de Guise en 1132, en Guise, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1145, en Guise, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Francia.
